prompt: A single client's page: their document checklist with per-document status, who on our staff is assigned, and the latest messages between us and them.
wire:
export default function DocActions({ clientId, docs }: { clientId: string; docs: any[] }) { const [selected, setSelected] = useState(""); const [action, setAction] = useState<"verify"|"reject"|"receive">("verify"); const [reason, setReason] = useState(""); const [fileName, setFileName] = useState(""); const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle"|"pending"|"done"|"error">("idle"); const [message, setMessage] = useState(""); const actionableDocs = (docs || []).filter(d => d.status === "received" || d.status === "needs_review" || d.status === "missing" ); async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) { e.preventDefault(); if (!selected) return; setStatus("pending"); setMessage(""); try { const body: any = { action }; if (action === "receive") body.fileName = fileName; if (action === "reject") body.reason = reason; const result = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: clientId, docId: selected, body }); if (result?.status === "pending-approval") { setStatus("pending"); setMessage("Action submitted — awaiting approval."); } else { setStatus("done"); setMessage("Document status updated."); } } catch (err: any) { setStatus("error"); setMessage("Something went wrong. Please try again."); } } const selectedDoc = actionableDocs.find(d => d.id === selected); return (
